r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: I don't know if I need a chiropractor or what to expect
relatability_triggers: Summer is just around the corner! And, to celebrate as a new patient at HealthSource, from now until June 16, you don't have to pay to find out what's wrong, only to fix it!

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: : We examine you, find out why you're in pain, and then get to the cause to try and make sure that your pain never returns. Your NO COST new patient exam includes a comprehensive musculoskeletal and motion exam, functional movement check, wellness assessment, and a complete report of findings. You'll receive a detailed report of findings so you'll know exactly what issues we discover, and the solutions for them.
unique_differentiators: Comprehensive exam with full report at no cost

lead.hook_sentence: Summer is just around the corner! And, to celebrate as a new patient at HealthSource, from now until June 16, you don't have to pay to find out what's wrong, only to fix it!
lead.full_text: Summer is just around the corner! And, to celebrate as a new patient at HealthSource, from now until June 16, you don't have to pay to find out what's wrong, only to fix it! It's our Gift to you and every member of your family! Start your Summer off trouble-free, without pain, and with excellent health! Your NO COST new patient exam includes a comprehensive musculoskeletal and motion exam, functional movement check, wellness assessment, and a complete report of findings...plus, more. And for the first 20 new patients who bring in this ad, we're giving away a stress busting, muscle loosening, progressive rehab massage, also NO COST!

mechanism.explanation_text: We examine you, find out why you're in pain, and then get to the cause to try and make sure that your pain never returns. Your NO COST new patient exam includes a comprehensive musculoskeletal and motion exam, functional movement check, wellness assessment, and a complete report of findings. You'll receive a detailed report of findings so you'll know exactly what issues we discover, and the solutions for them.
mechanism.uniqueness_claim: Comprehensive exam with full report at no cost

supporting_promises.statement: Free progressive rehab massage for first 20
Complete report of findings - know exactly what's wrong

metadata.source_file: HealthSource No Chiro Insurance 2015-2016 (4 Stars) Professional Practice Lead Gen.md
metadata.extraction_notes: Local chiropractic lead gen. Free exam value stacking ($189). First 20 patients get massage bonus. 'White-Knuckle Flyer' anxiety acknowledgment. Dentist analogy for chiropractic explanation.

fssit_candidates.statement: Maybe you're not exactly sure what a chiropractor is or what we do
If you're a 'White-Knuckle Flyer,' a little unsure of what to expect
fssit_candidates.past_explaining_power: Names the anxiety feeling with metaphor

extraction_quality.notes: Simple local lead gen format but with good techniques: 'White-Knuckle Flyer' metaphor for anxiety acknowledgment is clever, dentist analogy explains unfamiliar service, named staff personalizes. Value stack ($189) and first 20 bonus create urgency. Template-style ad but well-executed for local practice.

notable_elements.white_knuckle_flyer_metaphor: Clever anxiety acknowledgment - compares nervous patients to fearful airplane passengers
notable_elements.dentist_analogy: We are to back pain, neck pain, headaches, and wellness what dentists are to teeth - simple clarifying comparison
notable_elements.named_staff: Call Sian or Brittany - personalizes the experience
